attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"g:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\FeatureWheel\\\\FeatureWheelManager.ts\",\"content\":\"    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\",\"numLines\":130,\"startLine\":160,\"totalLines\":679}}"</outcome>

格落點演出節點（順序對應格 0~11；現僅供 DevAssertConfig 數量檢查，落點演出已改用結果展示牌）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Node], displayName: '12 格落點演出節點' })\\n    private m_segmentNodes: Node[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌根節點（暫代落點演出：顯示落點 feature 符號；退場由 HIDE_RESULT 事件觸發）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '結果展示牌根節點' })\\n    private m_resultNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange（5 張圖索引對齊 TYPE_ICON_CONFIG，與 12 格 icon 同套索引）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultSpriteChange: SpriteChange = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌背景 SpriteChange（背景隨落點 type 切換；5 張圖索引同 m_resultSpriteChange）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌背景 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultBgSpriteChange: SpriteChange = null;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BigWheel（EyeStrike2_BigWheel）BaseSpine：進場 Active / 落點 Collect / 退場 Out / 待機 Idle，skin 依落點功能切換。\\n     * 播放走 BaseSpine（內部 SpineKit，含動畫存在檢查 + setSlotsToSetupPose）。拖 FeatureWheelResult 節點（其上有 null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 轉動方向：勾選=順時針，取消=逆時針（預設順時針）*/\\n    @property({ displayName: '順時針轉動' })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 轉動方向：勾選=順時針，取消=逆時針（預設順時針）*/\\n    @property({ displayName: '順時針轉動' })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect 播畢後中間維持亮起（end pose），退場由 PlayExit 的 Out（盤面回歸+暗掉）負責。\\n     * Spine 缺失（m_bigWheelSpine 未綁）→ PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     */\\n    private async PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n        if (!seg) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 先切到落點功能 skin（Multiplier/Upgrade/Shift 直對；FG/Grand/None → default），再播 Collect\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type));\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 SpriteChange。\\n     * ⚠️ Collect 動畫取代結果展示牌後無呼叫者；保留待美術定案後連同 m_result* 屬性整條移除。\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 m_resultNode——該節點現為 BigWheel Spine 的父容器，關閉會連帶隱藏 BigWheel。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌後無實際收場需求，保留空實作以相容既有事件/呼叫；\\n     * TODO(清理)：result-card 路徑（ApplyResultSprite / m_result* 屬性）全面移除後刪此方法。\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n        // no-op：m_resultNode 已挪作 BigWheel 容器，不可在此 active=false\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）+ 播 BigWheel Idle 待機呼吸\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     * Spine：回 default skin + 播 Idle 循環（呼吸效果）；軟體 12 格緩轉與 Spine 呼吸為兩獨立層\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放進場 Active（一個 round 一次，落在第一次轉動前）；播畢回調。\\n     * 進場用 default skin（中間尚未落定功能）。Spine 缺失 → PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayEnter(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Active);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayEnter onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放退場 Out（一個 round 一次，落在全部轉動與效果演完後）；播畢回調。\\n     * Out 的「中間功能暗掉」作用於當前落點 skin，故 setSkin(default) 放在 Out 之後（暗掉後再回 default 待 Idle）。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayExit(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Out);\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayExit onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定 BigWheel skin（null/失效守衛）。委派 BaseSpine.SetSkin（內含 setSlotsToSetupPose）\\n     * @param skinName skin 名（default/Multiplier/Shift/Upgrade）\\n     */\\n    private SetSpineSkin(skinName: string) {\\n        if (this.m_bigWheelSpine && this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            this.m_bigWheelSpine.SetSkin(skinName);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 單次（非循環）動畫，await 播畢/中斷才 resolve。委派 SpineKit（經 BaseSpine.PlayAnimation）。\\n     * Spine 缺失 → 立即 resolve；動畫名無效 → BaseSpine 內部 warn + 回 false，皆不 hang 呼叫端（DR-2 完成訊號鏈防 hang）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Active/Collect/Out）\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpineOnce(animName: string): Promise<void> {\\n        if (!this.m_bigWheelSpine || !this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // BaseSpine.PlayAnimation 回 Promise<boolean>（播畢/中斷時 resolve）；此處只需等其結束，忽略結果旗標\\n        await this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, false);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 循環動畫（Idle 待機呼吸），不 await（循環動畫不等完成）。委派 SpineKit（經 BaseSpine.PlayAnimation）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Idle）\\n     */\\n    private PlaySpineLoop(animName: string) {\\n        if (!this.m_bigWheelSpine || !this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 循環播放：isLoop=true；回傳 Promise 於首圈完成 resolve，不 await（不影響續循環）\\n        this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, true);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 緩解：驗節點數量，順序語意仍須人工核對 prefab）\\n     */\\n    private DevAssertConfig() {\\n        if (!DEV) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：SpriteChange 數 ${this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentNodes.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：落點節點數 ${this.m_segmentNodes.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 方法\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前轉動落點索引（每次轉動 +1 循環 0~11）*/\\n    private m_testLandIndex = 0;\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前 UI 顯示狀態（給 DIGIT_4 切換）*/\\n    private m_testUIShown = false;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊測試按鍵（僅 DEBUG 構建生效；正式構建零副作用）\\n     */\\n    private RegisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // input.on(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取消註冊測試按鍵（與 RegisterTestKeyCodes 對稱，避免監聽洩漏）\\n     */\\n    private UnregisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查測試按鍵，走真實 eventManager 事件路徑驗證 落點結果 index=${result.index} type=${result.type}`);\\n                });\\n                break;\\n            }\\n            \\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_3:\\n                log('[FeatureWheel eventManager.Dispatch(this.m_testUIShown ? false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n aiTitle: PlayFlyEffect 函式用 FLY_EVENT 暫代

content.thinking:
Now we have actual work! The session has made a file modification. Let me understand what was done:

1. In FeatureWheelManager.ts, they added `FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE` to the EVENT_LIST array.
2. This was added at line 180 in the event registration list.
3. The GET_TARGET_NODE event was already defined in the FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT constant (line 90), but it wasn't being registered in the EVENT_LIST.

This is a bugfix - the GET_TARGET_NODE event was defined but not registered, so it wouldn't work when dispatched. Now it's properly added to the event registration list.

I should record this as a bugfix observation.

* @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）+ 播 BigWheel Idle 待機呼吸\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     * Spine：回 default skin + 播 Idle 循環（呼吸效果）；軟體 12 格緩轉與 Spine 呼吸為兩獨立層\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放進場 Active（一個 round 一次，落在第一次轉動前）；播畢回調。\\n     * 進場用 default skin（中間尚未落定功能）。Spine 缺失 → PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang /**\\n     * @ch 播放退場 Out（一個 round 一次，落在全部轉動與效果演完後）；播畢回調。\\n     * Out 的「中間功能暗掉」作用於當前落點 skin，故 setSkin(default) 放在 Out 之後（暗掉後再回 default 待 Idle）。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayExit(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Out);\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayExit onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定 BigWheel skin（null/失效守衛）。委派 BaseSpine.SetSkin（內含 setSlotsToSetupPose）\\n     * @param skinName skin 名（default/Multiplier/Shift/Upgrade）\\n     */\\n    private SetSpineSkin(skinName: string) {\\n        if (this.m_bigWheelSpine && this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            this.m_bigWheelSpine.SetSkin(skinName);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 單次（非循環）動畫，await 播畢/中斷才 resolve。委派 SpineKit（經 BaseSpine.PlayAnimation）。\\n     * Spine 缺失 → 立即 resolve；動畫名無效 → BaseSpine 內部 warn + 回 false，皆不 hang 呼叫端（DR-2 完成訊號鏈防 hang）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Active/Collect/Out）\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpineOnce(animName: string): Promise<void> {\\n        if (!this.m_bigWheelSpine || !this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // BaseSpine.PlayAnimation 回 Promise<boolean>（播畢/中斷時 resolve）；此處只需等其結束，忽略結果旗標\\n        await this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, false);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 循環動畫（Idle 待機呼吸），不 await（循環動畫不等完成）。委派 SpineKit（經 BaseSpine.PlayAnimation）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Idle）\\n     */\\n    private PlaySpineLoop(animName: string) {\\n        if (!this.m_bigWheelSpine || !this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 循環播放：isLoop=true；回傳 Promise 於首圈完成 resolve，不 await（不影響續循環）\\n        this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, true);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 (this.m_segmentNodes.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：落點節點數 ${this.m_segmentNodes.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n false;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊測試按鍵（僅 DEBUG 構建生效；正式構建零副作用）\\n     */\\n    private RegisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        //   if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查測試按鍵，走真實 eventManager 事件路徑驗證 FeatureWheel 功能\\n     * DIGIT_1：初始化 + 設定預設輪盤資料 + 顯示 UI（一鍵就緒）\\n     * DIGIT_2：轉動到下一格（循環 0~11）並印出落點結果（驗證旋轉/落點演出/callback）\\n     * DIGIT_3：重設隨機輪盤資料（驗證 icon 與乘倍數值動態更新）\\n     * DIGIT_4：切換顯示/隱藏 UI\\n     */\\n    private CheckTestKeyCode(event: EventKeyboard) {\\n        switch (event.keyCode) {\\n            // case KeyCode.DIGIT_1:\\n            //     log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 初始化 + 設定預設資料 + 顯示 UI');\\n            //     // INIT 僅需非 null 物件以通過參數驗證並翻起 m_isInit；\\n            //     // m_gameView 在本元件未被讀取，測試以 this.node 佔位即可\\n            //     eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT, this.node);\\n            //     eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, GetDefaultSegments());\\n            //     eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI);\\n            //     break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_2: {\\n                const landIndex = this.m_testLandIndex % FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT;\\n                this.m_testLandIndex++;\\n                log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 轉動到第 ${landIndex} 格`);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN, landIndex, (result: SpinResult) => {\\n                    log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 落點結果 index=${result.index} type=${result.type}`);\\n                });\\n                break;\\n            }\\n            \\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_3:\\n                log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 恢復 Idle 緩轉');\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE );\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_4:\\n                this.m_testUIShown = !this.m_testUIShown;\\n                log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 切換 UI 顯示 → ${this.m_testUIShown}`);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(this.m_testUIShown ? FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI : FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI);\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 產生 12 格隨機測試資料（type 隨機）\\n     */\\n    private BuildRandomTestSegments(): SegmentDescriptor[] {\\n        const types = [\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame,\\n        ];\\n        const segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const type = types[Math.floor(Math.random() * types.length)];\\n            segments.push({ type });\\n        }\\n        return segments;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 測試功能\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":284,\"oldLines\":8,\"newStart\":284,\"newLines\":24,\"lines\":[\"             case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\",\"                 this.HideResult();\",\"                 break;\",\"+\",\"+            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE:\",\"+                if (typeof args[0] === 'function') {\",\"+                    args[0](this.GetTargetNode());\",\"+                } else {\",\"+                    error('FeatureWheel GET_TARGET_NODE 缺少 callback');\",\"+                }\",\"+                break;\",\"         }\",\"     }\",\"+\",\"+    /**\",\"+     * @ch 取得目標節點（飛行演出起點）：BigWheel Spine 節點 → 根節點 → 自身節點 依序 fallback。\",\"+     * @returns 目標 Node（理論上不為 null；m_bigWheelSpine/m_rootNode 未掛時退回 this.node）\",\"+     */\",\"+    private GetTargetNode(): Node {\",\"+        return this.m_bigWheelSpine?.node ?? this.m_rootNode ?? this.node;\",\"+    }\",\"     //#endregion 事件註冊\",\" \",\"     //#region 方法\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

\\\"cc\\\";\\nimport GameView from \\\"../GameView\\\";\",\"newString\":\"import { _decorator, log, Node, Vec3 } from \\\"cc\\\";\\nimport GameView from \\\"../GameView\\\";\\nimport { FLY_EVENT } from \\\"../FlyManager\\\";\",\"originalFile\":\"import { _decorator, log, Vec3 } from \\\"cc\\\";\\nimport GameView from \\\"../GameView\\\";\\nimport { BaseState, eventManager, stateManager } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/Managers\\\";\\nimport Game_Define from \\\"../Game_Define\\\";\\nimport { FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT } from \\\"../FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager\\\";\\nimport { FeatureWheelSegmentType, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT, SpinResult } from \\\"../FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelTypes\\\";\\nimport { FEATURE_MARK_EVENT } from \\\"../FeatureWheel/FeatureMarkEvent\\\";\\nimport { JP_EVENT, JP_Type } from \\\"../JP/JP_Define\\\";\\nimport { SHAKE_EVENT } from \\\"../ShakeManager\\\";\\nimport { REEL_MANAGER_EVENT } from \\\"../ReelManager\\\";\\nimport { ar2es2Proto } from \\\"@igs-arcade-division-rd2/uk_872_eyestrike2_proto\\\";\\n\\nconst { ccclass } = _decorator;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch Feature Wheel 轉輪演出 State（骨架 + 轉輪，不含落點後盤面效果）\\n *\\n * 位置：plate0 的 AWARD（對線獎）之後、ROUND_SHOW_END 之前（由 GameView.AfterShowWin 守衛導向）。\\n * 對應規格 3.1 STEP3-5「檢查轉輪 → 觸發轉輪 → 第一次發動」；重轉（STEP6）仍為後續 plate。\\n *\\n * 職責邊界（scope = 骨架+轉輪演出）：\\n *   IN  — SHOW_UI → 依 WheelFeatures 逐項 PLAY_SPIN(SlotIndex) 序列等待 → HIDE_UI → ROUND_SHOW_END\\n *   OUT — 落點後的盤面演出（符號轉 CASH / 乘倍 badge / 升級 / FG 交棒）由後續 plate 停輪或後續階段處理\\n *\\n * 不在此 State 改動狀態機路由：FG（Type=0/4）的實際進場仍走既有 CheckState/LeaveRespin 的 IsGoingToFree。\\n */\\n@ccclass( \\\"FeatureWheelShowState\\\" )\\nexport class FeatureWheelShowState extends BaseState\\n{\\n    //#region 進場盤面效果參數（震動 + 盤面往下；需配合畫面實測微調）\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 盤面位移量（傳給 ZOOM_IN_REEL 的 targetLocalPos）。\\n     * ⚠️ ZoomInReel 公式：targetPos = 原座標 − targetLocalPos×scale → y 取「正」時盤面往「下」。\\n     *    動的是 GetZoomTarget()（GameView 整體），實際位移幅度需看畫面微調；BigWheel 若為其子節點會一起被移動。\\n     */\\n    private static readonly BOARD_ZOOM_POS = new Vec3( 0, 80, 0 );\\n    /**@ch 盤面縮放（1 = 只位移不放大；>1 會放大整個 GameView）*/\\n    private static readonly BOARD_ZOOM_SCALE = 1.25;\\n    /**@ch 盤面往下（ZoomIn）動畫時長（秒）*/\\n    private static readonly BOARD_ZOOM_IN_DURATION = 0.2;\\n    /**@ch 盤面還原（ZoomOut）動畫時長（秒）*/\\n    private static readonly BOARD_ZOOM_OUT_DURATION = 0.2;\\n    //#endregion\\n\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n\\n    constructor( gameView: GameView )\\n    {\\n        super();\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n    }\\n\\n    public async OnEnter()\\n    {\\n        log( \\\"OnEnter State : FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW\\\" );\\n\\n        // 只取「有效」轉輪項（Type≠None）。理論上進到此 State 必有 ≥1（AfterShowWin 已用 HasActiveWheel 守衛），\\n        // 此處再過濾一次防禦：把混在其中的 None 項剔除，避免無意義轉動。\\n        const features = ( this.m_gameView.RoundInfo?.WheelFeatures ?? [] )\\n            .filter( w => w != null && w.Type !== FeatureWheelSegmentType.None );\\n\\n        if ( features.length === 0 )\\n        {\\n            // 不應發生（守衛已擋）；fail-loud 但不炸狀態機，直接續流程\\n            console.warn( \\\"[FeatureWheelShowState] 無有效 WheelFeatures，跳過轉輪演出\\\" );\\n            stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_SHOW_END );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 進場盤面效果：震動只在進場「震一下就停」（單次自停，避免轉動時持續晃很怪）；盤面往下(ZoomIn)持續整段、退場才還原。\\n        // 用 try/finally 保證 StopBoardEffect 一定執行（ZoomIn 記原始狀態，未配對盤面回不去）。\\n        this.StartBoardEffect();\\n        try\\n        {\\n            // 進場 Active（盤面下降+灰塵+光效）：一個 round 一次，落在第一次轉動前；await 播畢（Spine 缺失則立即返回不 hang）\\n            await this.PlayWheelEnter();\\n\\n            // WheelCount 迴圈：逐項「序列等待」——PlaySpin 有 m_isSpinning 重入守衛，\\n            // 未等前一次 callback 就發下一次會被靜默丟棄（FeatureWheelManager 行為，BC-2 硬約束）。\\n            for ( const wf of features )\\n            {\\n                const landIndex = wf.SlotIndex ?? 0;\\n\\n                // 防 hang：PlaySpin 對越界 landIndex 是 warn+return（不呼叫 callback）→ 若 await 會永久掛住。\\n                // 故在 dispatch 前先驗範圍，越界則 fail-loud 跳過該次（不 await）。\\n                if ( landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT )\\n                {\\n                    console.warn( `[FeatureWheelShowState] SlotIndex=${landIndex} 越界 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}，跳過該次轉動` );\\n                    continue;\\n                }\\n\\n                const result = await this.PlaySpinOnce( landIndex );\\n\\n                // fail-loud 一致性：落點 type 應與 server WheelFeatures.Type 相符\\n                // （前提 P：server SlotIndex 與客戶端 12 格序一致——待 server 對拍；不符僅 warn 不阻流程）\\n                if ( result != null && result.type !== wf.Type )\\n                {\\n                    console.warn( `[FeatureWheelShowState] 落點 type 不一致：landed=${result.type} vs server=${wf.Type}（SlotIndex=${landIndex}）` );\\n                }\\n\\n                // 飛個效果下來到盤面指定位置\\n                await this.PlayFlyEffect( wf );\\n\\n                // ②標記 seam：通知演出端在盤面標記此功能（標記/icon/乘倍/Grand報獎/FreeGame盤外 由同事 handler 渲染）。\\n                await this.PlayMarkEffect( wf );\\n\\n                // 落點顯示已由 BigWheel Collect 動畫（PlaySpin 內 await）負責，中間維持亮起至退場 Out；\\n                // 故不再需要結果展示牌的暫代 dwell 與 HIDE_RESULT。\\n            }\\n\\n            // ③轉換 seam：標記後、進 respin 前，套用符號轉換（一般符號→CASH）。fire-and-forget；演出由同事 handler 渲染。\\n            const transferResult = this.m_gameView.RoundInfo?.TransferResult ?? [];\\n            if ( transferResult.length > 0 )\\n            {\\n                await this.PlaySymbolTransferEffect( transferResult );\\n            }\\n\\n            // 退場 Out（盤面回歸+中間功能暗掉）：等全部轉動與效果（含 transfer）演完才播，一個 round 一次\\n            await this.PlayWheelExit();\\n        }\\n        finally\\n        {\\n            // 盤面效果收尾：停震動 + 還原 ZoomIn（await 還原完成，盤面回正後才續流程）。\\n            // 放 finally 確保即使上面拋例外也會停震動/還原盤面，不卡死畫面。\\n            await this.StopBoardEffect();\\n        }\\n\\n        eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE );\\n\\n        stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_SHOW_END );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 啟動進場盤面效果：單次全畫面震動（SHAKE，播完自停）+ 盤面往下（ZoomIn）。fire-and-forget，與 Active 同時。\\n     * 震動單次自停、不需配對；ZoomIn 記原始狀態，須與 StopBoardEffect 的 RESTORE 配對（由 OnEnter try/finally 保證）。\\n     */\\n    private StartBoardEffect()\\n    {\\n        eventManager.Dispatch( SHAKE_EVENT.SHAKE_WITH_NAME, \\\"feature_wheel_active\\\" );\\n        eventManager.Dispatch(\\n            REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.ZOOM_IN_REEL,\\n            FeatureWheelShowState.BOARD_ZOOM_POS,\\n            FeatureWheelShowState.BOARD_ZOOM_SCALE,\\n            FeatureWheelShowState.BOARD_ZOOM_IN_DURATION\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 停止進場盤面效果：還原 ZoomIn；await 還原動畫播畢才 resolve（盤面回正後才續流程）。\\n     * 另發 SHAKE STOP 作安全網（單次震動通常已自停，此處確保退場不殘留震動）。\\n     * RESTORE_ZOOM 若未曾 ZoomIn（m_isZoomed=false）會立即回調，不會 hang。\\n     */\\n    private StopBoardEffect(): Promise<void>\\n    {\\n        eventManager.Dispatch( SHAKE_EVENT.STOP );\\n        return new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n        {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.RESTORE_ZOOM,\\n                FeatureWheelShowState.BOARD_ZOOM_OUT_DURATION,\\n                () => resolve()\\n            );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch <observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Implement GET_TARGET_NODE event handler in FeatureWheelManager</title>
  <subtitle>Added event handler and GetTargetNode method to provide target node for fly animations</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>GET_TARGET_NODE event handler added to OnEvent switch statement at line 287</fact>
    <fact>Event handler validates callback parameter and invokes it with GetTargetNode() result</fact>
    <fact>GetTargetNode() method implements fallback chain: m_bigWheelSpine?.node → m_rootNode → this.node</fact>
    <fact>Method ensures non-null return value by falling back to component's own node</fact>
    <fact>Error logged if GET_TARGET_NODE event dispatched without callback parameter</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Implemented the GET_TARGET_NODE event functionality in FeatureWheelManager to support fly animation effects. When external systems (like FlyManager) need to animate objects toward the feature wheel, they can dispatch this event with a callback to receive the appropriate target node. The GetTargetNode() method uses a three-tier fallback strategy: first attempting to return the BigWheel Spine node (the visual focal point), then the root node, and finally the component's own node as a guaranteed fallback. This ensures fly animations always have a valid destination even if certain nodes are not configured in the prefab. The event handler validates that a callback function is provided as the first argument, logging an error if missing to aid debugging.</narrative>
  <concepts>

The implementation spans two main files: FeatureWheelManager now exposes a GET_TARGET_NODE event that external systems can use to obtain the animation start point, and FeatureWheelShowState's PlayFlyEffect method orchestrates the actual fly animations from the wheel to multiple board positions. The architecture follows an event-driven pattern for loose coupling—FlyManager doesn't need direct reference to FeatureWheelManager, instead using the event system. The GetTargetNode fallback chain ensures robustness even with incomplete prefab configurations. The temporary use of the Scatter→MagicPot animation is clearly documented with warnings about its callback limitations and notes that it should be replaced when dedicated assets are available. The implementation handles edge cases (empty positions, invalid nodes) gracefully and uses Promise.all to parallelize animations for better performance. Full type-safety verified through compilation.</narrative>
